name: notambourine
description: Supply-chain security tooling for Claude Code, by NoTambourine.

plugins.name: wormhook
plugins.description: npm/node supply-chain malware scanner for Claude Code. Tiered hook detecting Shai-Hulud (1.0-3.0 + Mini), the SAP-CAP/AntV/TeamPCP agent-hijack wave, Axios/DPRK RAT, SANDWORM_MODE, the Hades/PyPI .pth startup-hook wave, and remote-eval loaders via filename, SHA256, and behavioral IOCs. Blocks agent-boundary persistence: rogue .claude/.cursor/.continue/.vscode hooks and MCP entries, .vscode/tasks.json folderOpen auto-exec, .pth startup hooks, poisoned git hooks, and LaunchAgent/systemd units. Adds Python (pip/uv) execution gating and a UserPromptSubmit continuous monitor; nudges you to pair it with Socket Firewall + safedep/vet for install-time registry defense.
